name: Yorkshire Spice Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pound loaf  2 1/2 c Bread flour + 2 Tbsp
3/4 cup Milk     1 Tbsp Orange peel, dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the bread flour and 2 1/2 cups of water to your bread machine pan.
2. Pour in the milk, orange peel, maple syrup, applesauce (or butter), egg, nutmeg, cinnamon, and yeast.
3. If using a setting for raisins, you can add them when the machine beeps.
4. Mix on the lowest speed until combined.
5. Bake according to your bread machine's settings.
6. Turn off the machine once baking is complete.
